title: Windows Forensics: IIS Webshell — Live PowerShell
description: IIS-WEB-01's ASP.NET upload endpoint accepted a .aspx file. The webshell now spawns child processes off w3wp and pivots to internal MSSQL. Reconstruct the chain end-to-end.

hints.text: `connect iis-web-01`. `Get-IISAccessLog | include aspx` shows every webshell GET — they all share the same source IP and same path under /uploads/avatars/.
`Get-WinEvent | include w3wp` pulls the 4688 process-create events where w3wp is the CreatorProcessName — the chain branches from there.
`Get-Content` (or `cat` / `type`) the suspect .aspx file to see the webshell source — confirms it's a REDACTED wrapper.
